name: OPT-IML 30B
note: Instruction-tuned OPT fine-tuned on a curated ~1,500-task subset of the OPT-IML Bench, with the remaining tasks held out for downstream evaluation; early instruction-tuning at scale. (OPT-IML-Max is a separate sibling checkpoint trained on the full ~2,000-task bench.)
tpsNote: llama.cpp does not support the OPT architecture, so no RTX 4090 llama.cpp figure exists even though the Q4 footprint would fit in 24GB.
